description: Learn about USDS Margined Battle, a feature for predicting price movements in cryptocurrency trading. Compete with others in one-minute sessions to earn points, regardless of winning or losing.
topic_summary: USDS Margined Battle allows users to predict crypto price movements in one-minute battles, earning points and badges based on performance. Participants must log into Binance, select a battle pair, and place market orders to compete. Each battle lasts one minute, with results displayed post-battle.
